Performance Youll Love  Under the hood, the 2026 Civic Sport packs a responsive 2.0L 4-cylinder engine with 158 horsepower, paired with a smooth CVT for efficient yet spirited driving. Whether you're commuting through Boulder or taking a weekend trip to the Rockies, the Civic Sport offers dynamic handling and impressive fuel economy.   Tech-Savvy & Connected  Stay connected with the Civics advanced tech features, including a crisp 9-inch touchscreen, Apple CarPlay®, Android Auto, and a premium 8-speaker sound system. Safety Comes Standard  Honda Sensing® is standard on the 2026 Civic Sport, offering adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, collision mitigation braking, and more. description: Discover the 2026 Honda Civic Sport FWD at Fisher Auto in Boulder, Colorado  Upgrade your driving experience with the all-new 2026 Honda Civic Sport FWD, now available at Fisher Auto in Boulder. Combining sleek design, advanced technology, and reliable performance, this compact sedan is perfect for Colorado drivers who value style, efficiency, and safety.  The 2026 Honda Civic Sport FWD stands out with its sporty exterior, featuring a bold front grille, LED headlights, and aerodynamic lines that make every drive a statement. It will accelerate back to the set speed when the road straightens out.Safety and Security An active blind spot system helps prevent the driver from making a lane change when another vehicle is in their blind spot. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control. Important Package Information: Preferred Equipment Group 0RP Convenience The cruise control accesses camera, radar and/or GPS satellite data, to automatically determine if it should slow for a curve in the road ahead. If the vehicle detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness it will automatically bring the vehicle to a stop and turn on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will be contacted.Safety and Security The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. A system of this type allows the driver to travel for extended periods of time without providing steering input to the vehicle, however they must be ready to resume control of the vehicle at any point. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display.Technology and Telematics Mobile devices can wirelessly connect to the internet through the vehicle's private mobile network. description: Vehicle Identification Number: 1FTFW3LD6RFA73327 Model Year: 2024 Manufacturer: Ford Motor Company Model Line: F-150 Trim Level: XLT Cab Style: SuperCrew (4-Door) Exterior Color: Black Interior Color: Black with Dark Stone accents Drivetrain: Four-Wheel Drive (4WD) Engine: 3.5L EcoBoost V6  Detailed Description:  This 2024 Ford F-150 XLT is a full-size pickup that masterfully blends iconic capability with modern comfort and technology. Presented in a commanding Black exterior, its SuperCrew cab configuration provides full-size rear doors for easy access to a spacious, family-friendly interior.  Power is delivered by the renowned and robust 3.5L EcoBoost twin-turbo V6 engine, providing an exceptional combination of horsepower, torque, and towing capacity. Paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission and a sophisticated Four-Wheel Drive (4WD) system, this truck is engineered for confidence in all conditions, from worksites to inclement weather.  The interior is outfitted in a practical yet stylish Black with Dark Stone two-tone cloth seating. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise  and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: The 2024 Honda CR-V Hybrid Sport is a spirited and efficient compact SUV that blends engaging performance, modern styling, and everyday versatility into a compelling package. Supportive seating with premium cloth and contrast stitching provides comfort for both driver and passengers, while generous headroom and legroom make longer journeys enjoyable. The intuitive dashboard layout centers around a responsive touchscreen infotainment system with seamless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, Bluetooth connectivity, and available premium audio to keep you connected and entertained on the go. Practical features such as dual-zone automatic climate control, multiple USB ports, and ample storage compartments enhance everyday convenience, and the versatile cargo area with easy-to-fold rear seats adapts effortlessly to gear, groceries, or weekend luggage. Convenience abounds with a power liftgate, rain-sensing wipers, wireless charging, and a suite of smart device app functions including remote start and vehicle location. The Grand Highlander is ready for family adventures or daily commutes, combining reliability, luxury, and modern technology in one elegant package. This 2025 Chevrolet Trax LT is a remarkable compact SUV that offers a winning combination of style, performance, and advanced technology. Driver Confidence Package  License Plate Front Mounting Package  LT Convenience Package  Adaptive Cruise Control  Rear Cross-Traffic Alert  Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert  Heated Steering Wheel  Heated Front Seats  Keyless Open  Rear Park Assist  Under the hood, the Trax LT boasts a turbocharged 1.2L Ecotec engine that delivers a responsive and efficient driving experience. The interior of the Trax LT is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind. The premium audio system, complete with SiriusXM satellite radio, will keep you entertained on the road, while the dual-zone automatic climate control ensures everyone on board stays comfortable. The available heated front seats and steering wheel are perfect for those chilly mornings, and the rearview camera and rear park assist make parking a breeze.  Safety is also a top priority in the Trax LT. With advanced features like forward collision alert, lane keep assist, and automatic emergency braking, you can have peace of mind knowing you and your passengers are well-protected.  Whether you're looking for a practical daily driver or a versatile weekend warrior, the 2025 Chevrolet Trax LT is the perfect choice. It comes equipped with the hardware needed to tackle the seasons in *State College* and *Lewistown*:  *   *2.5L 4-Cylinder Engine*: Delivers a balanced *187 horsepower* and *178 lb-ft of torque*, description: Just arrived is this pioneering, NO-ACCIDENT, NONSMOKER, ALL-WHEEL DRIVE 2025 Tesla Model Y Performance! ''The 2025 Model Y gets a lot right for an electric SUV. It can go more than 300 miles on a charge and can charge quickly and easily. It's also relatively roomy and practical.,'' Edmunds writes. The 2025 Tesla Model Y has maintained its IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK Plus award from 2022, and it also carries a 5-star ANCAP Safety rating based on EuroNCAP tests from 2022. Additionally, the Model Y is currently the best-selling electric vehicle in the U.S. Using a public Tesla Supercharger, you can add between 151 and 170 miles of range (depending on trim) in just 15 minutes of charging. Tesla's Wall Connector for home use can add dozens of miles of range per hour of charging, and it has a universal adapter to fit any electric vehicle. Using a 240-volt home outlet -- like the kind you plug a large appliance into -- returns a little less range per hour than the Wall Connector. With its odometer now hovering around the 22,847 mark, it is STILL COVERED under the balance of the factory BUMPER-TO-BUMPER (Basic Vehicle Limited) warranty until February 2029 or 50,000 miles (whichever occurs first)! Additionally, the battery pack and drivetrain components of this zero-emission electric crossover will be covered by the remainder of the Battery and Drive Unit Limited Warranty, guaranteeing a minimum of 70% battery capacity retention over that period, until 2033 or 100,000 miles! These warranties cover the repair or replacement necessary to correct defects in the materials or workmanship of any parts manufactured or supplied by Tesla, which occur under normal use! Standard driver-assistance features: Adaptive cruise control Automatic high-beam headlights Autopilot (semi-autonomous highway driving mode with automated steering, acceleration and braking) Blind-spot monitoring Forward automatic emergency braking Forward collision warning Front and rear parking sensors Lane-departure warning Lane-keep assist Pedestrian and cyclist detection Rear cross-traffic alert Rearview camera Traffic-sign recognition Further highlights: Panoramic glass roof Dual-zone automatic climate control Synthetic leather upholstery Power-adjustable front seats Heated front and rear seats 15-inch central touchscreen Streaming services (navigation and entertainment; subscription required) Wireless device charger 14-speaker sound system This sportier Performance version is rated at approximately 456 to 460 horsepower (338-340 kW) and around 497 lb-ft of torque. It further offers: 277 miles of range Tesla-quoted 0-60 mph time of 3.5 seconds 21-inch wheels Lowered suspension Aluminum alloy pedals ...and perhaps even more! You can view vehicle files above this description [on our site], which may include the original brochure and window sticker! WHY buy new when we have this absolutely LIKE-NEW 2025 Tesla Model Y available for THOUSANDS LESS than the price of a brand new one?! Vehicle Highlights:Towing Package ($540 value)Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise  and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control. Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. description: All our New & Used vehicles come with  any time car washes available only at our Collinsville Ford Location.  This  2025 Hyundai Santa Fe Calligraphy, has a Ecotronic Gray Matte exterior and Forest Green/Beige interior color with only 6,303 miles.  Stock Number TT124. You can connect with us by calling (618) 491-5561.   No Accidents!  One Owner!     Option Group 01    Comfort Ventilated seats offer warm weather comfort by cooling areas of the occupant's body not exposed to the air conditioning system.Convenience The cruise control accesses camera, radar and/or GPS satellite data, to automatically determine if it should slow for a curve in the road ahead. This intelligent cruise control system uses laser or radar to maintain a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking (to a complete stop if needed) or accelerating as required. Cruise control maintains a preset vehicle speed; automatically increasing or decreasing throttle to maintain that speed. Access to the cargo area is gained via a large, power-operated rear door that opens upwards.  This door may also contain the rear windshield of the vehicle.Safety and Security With the cruise control on, engage the turn-signal and the vehicle will automatically change lanes at the first safe opportunity, without any further input from the driver. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost. A head-up display projects gauge (speed, RPM, etc.) information onto the inside of the windshield just below the driver's line of sight.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  Come on in to Jack Schmitt Ford today at 1820 Vandalia St Collinsville IL 62234 or call (618) 491-5561 to schedule a test drive![!@@Additional Info@@!]Engine: 2.5L Turbo GDI MPI DOHC 16-Valve I4 -inc: idle stop and go (ISG)|Transmission: 8-Speed DCT w/SHIFTRONIC -inc: shift-by-wire, paddle shifters and drive mode select (normal, sport, my drive)|Transmission w/Driver Selectable Mode|Front-wheel drive|3.32 Axle Ratio|Battery w/Run Down Protection|150 Amp Alternator|Towing Equipment -inc: Trailer Sway Control|5534# Gvwr|Gas-Pressurized Shock Absorbers|Front And Rear Anti-Roll Bars|Electric Power-Assist Speed-Sensing Steering|17.7 Gal. description: Step into refined performance and modern luxury with this 2025 Audi A5 Premium, a sophisticated sport coupe designed to deliver an exceptional balance of style, technology, and everyday driving comfort. With its sleek, aerodynamic silhouette and signature Audi design language, the A5 stands out with timeless elegance while offering the athletic presence drivers expect from a luxury performance vehicle. Crafted with precision and attention to detail, this Audi is built for those who appreciate both innovation and driving enjoyment.Powered by a responsive turbocharged engine, the Audi A5 Premium offers smooth acceleration and confident performance for city driving and highway cruising alike. Its precise steering and well-tuned suspension create a composed, engaging ride that reflects Audi's reputation for performance-focused engineering. Whether you are commuting through traffic or enjoying a scenic drive, the A5 delivers a refined and confident experience behind the wheel.Inside the cabin, you will find a thoughtfully designed interior that combines comfort with advanced technology. Premium materials, supportive seating, and a driver-focused layout create a welcoming atmosphere, while the intuitive infotainment system keeps you connected with seamless smartphone integration and easy access to navigation and media. Audi's advanced safety and driver assistance features add peace of mind by supporting awareness and control throughout every journey.The 2025 Audi A5 Premium is an excellent choice for drivers seeking a luxury coupe that blends performance, efficiency, and everyday practicality. Known for its sophisticated styling and premium craftsmanship, the A5 continues to set a high standard among luxury vehicles, delivering a driving experience that feels both dynamic and refined. If you are searching for a modern Audi that combines elegance with engaging performance, this A5 Premium is ready to impress.Come see us at Audi Nashville, 1576 Mallory Ln, Brentwood, TN 37027. description: Elevate your daily drive with this 2025 Audi Q5 Premium, a luxury SUV that perfectly blends performance, technology, and sophisticated design. Known for its refined craftsmanship and confident capability, the Audi Q5 delivers a premium driving experience that stands out in the competitive luxury SUV segment. Its sleek body lines, signature Audi styling, and athletic stance create a modern presence that is both elegant and dynamic.Under the hood, a responsive turbocharged engine provides smooth, efficient power, while Audi engineering ensures a balanced and composed ride. The advanced quattro all-wheel drive system enhances traction and stability, giving you added confidence whether navigating busy city streets or cruising on the highway. Precise steering and a well-tuned suspension deliver the engaging driving dynamics Audi is known for, making every journey feel controlled and comfortable.Inside the cabin, the Audi Q5 Premium surrounds you with modern luxury and intuitive technology. A driver-focused layout features high-quality materials, supportive seating, and a clean, contemporary design that enhances comfort for every passenger. The advanced infotainment system offers seamless connectivity, allowing you to access navigation, media, and smartphone integration with ease. Thoughtful storage solutions and versatile cargo space make this SUV practical for daily errands, family adventures, and weekend getaways alike. description: Thank you for choosing Classic Honda, this Urban Gray Pearl 2025 Honda CR-V LX is a great choice! Check out the following:  No Accidents!  One Owner!         This CR-V has the following features: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.  Perimeter/Approach Lights, 2 LCD Monitors In The Front, Cruise Control w/Steering Wheel Controls, Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) with Low-Speed Follow, Automatic Air Conditioning, Perimeter Alarm, Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS) + Forward Collision Warning (FCW), Collision Mitigation-Front, Driver Monitoring-Alert, Back-Up Camera  We price our cars, not our Customers. Our Best Price is clearly marked on every vehicle, saving you time and money by taking the stress of negotiating out of the car buying experience.  You can't buy the wrong car. Exchange or return your vehicle within 5-days / 300-miles for a full refund. New vehicle pricing excludes dealer installed accessories.  At Classic Honda, all of our vehicles are clearly marked with our haggle-free best price and our sales associates are commission-free. That means they'll help you find the car that fits you best, not the one that earns them the biggest commission check. Every vehicle we sell comes with a guaranteed peace of mind. Unhappy with your purchase? Take advantage of our market-leading return policy and bring it back within five days or three hundred miles, plain and simple.
